Modern evidence map for instructor debriefs, student recap slides, and printed handouts

Registry credential access and SAM hive save

Kerberoasting via LDAP SPN search and Kerberos

AlertIds join incidents back to AlertInfo and
Timeline pivots by behavior, timestamp, entity, MITRE
Ubuntu SSH, sudo, auditd, CUPS/IPP, .so load, and
Python/Go tooling reaches Oracle TNS on TCP/1521
Use this as the summary slide after students complete the hunt.
Which table gave the earliest signal?
Which activity required identity telemetry vs.
Which TVM rows explain exposure rather than
This replaces a dense two-column table with grouped evidence cards, table chips, and a debrief panel so students can see the investigation path without drowning in wide schemas.
Best use: instructor guide, recap slide, or printed handout after the lab topology diagram.
